meaning: n.弗雷迪(Fred的异体 亦作Freddy)(m.)
examples: Freddie Mercury was a flamboyant star of the hard rock scene.
Freddie would tell me nothing about what he was writing, except that it was to be a Christmas play.
The government created a second such institution called—and they gave it a boy's name with a nickname—Freddie Mac.
Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac might also be able to provide money for refinancing.
Goody had children Bobby, five, and Freddie, four, with former boyfriend and TV presenter Jeff Brazier.
